title: ERR_SSL_PROTOCOL_ERROR during YouTube OAuth2 authentication
symptom: When attempting to authenticate with YouTube using OAuth2, n8n throws an ERR_SSL_PROTOCOL_ERROR. The redirect URI incorrectly includes port 5678 instead of the default HTTPS port 443.
not_this_if: n8n is not behind a reverse proxy
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n is configured with incorrect environment variables that do not align with the Nginx reverse proxy settings. Specifically, the N8N_PROTOCOL should be set to 'http' when Nginx handles SSL termination, and the WEBHOOK_URL must be correctly defined to avoid including the port in the redirect URI.
fix_steps: Change the N8N_PROTOCOL environment variable from 'https' to 'http'.
Rename the N8N_WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to WEBHOOK_URL.
Remove unnecessary environment variables like N8N_PATH and VUE_APP_URL_BASE_API.
Restart the n8n service to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the environment variables in your Docker configuration and restart the n8n service.
